name: Fishjong
short_description: Dive into the magical world of underwater Mahjong. Test your skills again and again on more than 100 levels. Customize your tiles, sets, backgrounds and tile shapes. Take a load off with the game's relaxing music and meditative gameplay.
detailed_description: Dive into the magical world of underwater Mahjong. Test your skills again and again on more than 100 levels. Customize your tiles, sets, backgrounds and tile shapes. Take a load off with the game's relaxing music and meditative gameplay.
about_the_game: Dive into the magical world of underwater Mahjong. Test your skills again and again on more than 100 levels. Customize your tiles, sets, backgrounds and tile shapes. Take a load off with the game's relaxing music and meditative gameplay.
supported_languages:
English*, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Dutch, Japanese, Russian
*languages with full audio support
